calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Steven Mains, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Order granting waiver allowing witness appearance by Declaration, filed July 12, 2004.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Print Avenue, Inc., a corporation dba Print Out, fdba Print Out, a general Partnership; Shabana Shahbaz; and Nishat M.N. Gillani as follows:
Principal $12,592.85
Attorney fee $1,600.00
Interest $4,014.19
Costs $428.12
For the total of $18,635.16
Judgment signed in open court.
